title: Deeper Drilling
description: An addon for Deep Drilling, expanding  modded compatibility.
body:
# Overview
Deeper Drilling is an addon for [Deep Drilling](https://modrinth.com/mod/deepdrilling), adding 4 new Ore Nodes:

- Bauxite Node
- Galena Node
- Lignite Node
- Sulfur Node

## Requirements
- [Kubeloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubeloader)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Deep Drilling](https://modrinth.com/mod/deepdrilling)

### Optional, but recommended for full functionality
- [TFMG](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg)
- [Tank Defenses](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tank-defenses)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Embers Rekindled](https://modrinth.com/mod/embers)
